summary:
For both early-stage and locally advanced cancers of the cervix treated through brachytherapy, a high-dosage approach such as 85-90 Gray ensures effective tumor control necessary due to the critical nature of these disease stages. The emphasis lies heavily on delivering sufficient radiation within this range to achieve optimal therapeutic outcomes without compromising patient safety by exceeding safe limits for surrounding tissues. To summarize concisely based only upon your request,

1) High dosage between 85-90 Grays is crucial,
2) Ensures effectiveness especially important given stage severity but must be managed carefully regarding tissue tolerance levels.
